name: Feature 仓库
description: 浏览当前项目内已打包的 Feature 仓库

body.zh: 这里展示 resources/features 里的静态打包产物。页面优先读取包内 agentdev-feature.json，没有时回退到 package.json，并明确标记为元数据缺失。
body.en: This view scans resources/features. It reads agentdev-feature.json first, falls back to package.json, and flags packages with missing metadata.

description.zh: 用于当前阶段的交付浏览页，重点展示版本、描述、requirements 摘要和元数据完整性，不做严格权限治理。
description.en: Delivery-focused catalog view showing versions, descriptions, requirement summaries, and metadata completeness.
